name: chr21p_acrocentric_short_arm
description: Chromosome 21 short arm (21p), an acrocentric short arm composed of alpha-satellite, beta-satellite, 45S rDNA NOR and gamma-satellite-like sequences. Mostly unassembled in GRCh38; resolved in T2T-CHM13.

architecture.internal_structure: Acrocentric short-arm architecture shared with chr13/14/15/22; alpha-sat -> beta-sat -> NOR -> stalk.

related_diseases: Robertsonian translocations involving chr21 (rob(14;21) -> Down syndrome carriers)
